subject: fix: exclude data.json from PWA precache, use runtime caching instead
body:
data.json (2.68MB) exceeds Workbox's 2MB precache limit, causing
the build to fail. Moved to NetworkFirst runtime caching so it's
fetched fresh on each load and cached for offline PWA use.

- Remove data.json from globPatterns and narrow *.json in includeAssets
- Add NetworkFirst runtime caching rule for /data.json

https://claude.ai/code/session_01HfBuLLn6odQ2BFNovZ2toD
title: exclude data.json from PWA precache, use runtime caching instead
